result:
Here's a summary of all the changes made to implement the Redo feature:

## Changes Summary

### New files:
1. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/res/drawable/ic_redo_white.xml`** - Redo icon (mirrored undo arrow, standard Material Design)

### Modified files:

2. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/01-core.xml`** - Added `<string name="redo">Redo</string>` string resource

3. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/res/menu/reviewer.xml`** - Added `action_redo` menu item with the redo icon, initially disabled, shown if room permits

4. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/libanki/Collection.kt`** - Added `redoLabel()` and `redoAvailable()` functions, mirroring the existing `undoLabel()`/`undoAvailable()` but using the `redo` field from `UndoStatus`

5. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/Undo.kt`** - Added `redoAndShowSnackbar()` extension function, mirroring `undoAndShowSnackbar()` but using `redo()` and redo-related translation strings

6. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/cardviewer/ViewerCommand.kt`** - Added `REDO` enum value with default keyboard shortcut Shift+Z (matching Anki desktop convention)

7. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/Reviewer.kt`** - Added `R.id.action_redo` menu click handler calling `redo()`, and redo button configuration in `onCreateOptionsMenu` (enabled/disabled state, icon alpha, title)

8. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/AbstractFlashcardViewer.kt`** - Added `redo()` function (parallel to `undo()`) and `ViewerCommand.REDO` case in `executeCommand()`

9. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/reviewer/ActionButtonStatus.kt`** - Added `action_redo` button to the custom buttons setup

10. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/preferences.xml`** - Added `custom_button_redo_key` and `redo_command_key` preference keys

11. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/res/xml/preferences_custom_buttons.xml`** - Added redo ListPreference to the custom buttons settings screen

12. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/res/xml/preferences_controls.xml`** - Added redo ControlPreference for keyboard binding configuration

13. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/analytics/UsageAnalytics.kt`** - Added `binding_REDO` to analytics tracking

14. **`AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/preferences/CustomButtonsSettingsFragment.kt`** - Added `customButtonRedo` to the reset custom buttons handler

15. **`AnkiDroid/src/test/java/com/ichi2/anki/cardviewer/ViewerCommandTest.kt`** - Updated the preference keys assertion to include `binding_REDO`

### Architecture:
The backend already fully supported redo via `Collection.redo()` (in `BackendUndo.kt`) and the `UndoStatus.redo` field. The implementation exposes this existing backend capability through the Reviewer's UI by:
- Adding a redo toolbar button that shows when redo is available
- Supporting keyboard shortcut (Shift+Z)
- Allowing customization of the redo button in app bar settings
- Showing appropriate snackbar messages when redo is performed
